games.name: League Season (Round‑Robin + Playoffs)
games.do: Run a weekly growth loop (publish→index→treasury) against a shared brief.
games.make: Season dossier (plans, logs, KPIs, RCAs).
games.kpi: GDP uplift vs baseline; release velocity; defect escape rate.
games.accept: 6+ match logs, playoffs report, zero unresolved Sev‑1s.

games.name: Swiss Sprint League
games.do: Paired by record each round; ship the same challenge under evolving constraints.
games.make: Round sheets + diffs.
games.kpi: Cycle time; pass rate under constraint changes.
games.accept: All rounds logged; constraint tests passed.

games.name: Promotion / Relegation Ladder
games.do: Monthly promotion for top performers; bottom relegate; mid stays.
games.make: Ladder report + upgrade plan.
games.kpi: MoM reliability + growth delta.
games.accept: Clean SLO proof; transfer runbook.

games.name: Guild Wars (Alliance vs Alliance)
games.do: 3–5 teams form a Guild; conquer a cross‑domain brief (media + ops + search + repair).
games.make: Alliance charter + integration map.
games.kpi: Inter‑team handoff success ≥95%, cross‑system uptime ≥99.5%.
games.accept: Joint RCA with shared fixes upstreamed.

games.name: Triads (3‑Team Matches)
games.do: One team builds, one integrates, one hardens—rotate roles in 3 mini‑rounds.
games.make: Role playbooks + rotation logs.
games.kpi: MTTR, integration defect rate, feature completeness.
games.helps: Empathy across roles; fewer throw‑over‑wall failures.
games.accept: All rotations green; defects ≤ agreed cap.

games.name: Relay Ops (Baton Pass)
games.do: Team A drafts → Team B ships → Team C hardens within 24h baton windows.
games.make: Baton artifacts (handoff template + acceptance tests).
games.kpi: Handoff acceptance rate; total lead time.
games.accept: 3 complete batons; no failed acceptances.

games.name: Capture‑the‑Flag (Docs & Discovery)
games.do: Publish a feature; opposing teams must discover, reproduce, and document it faster.
games.make: Doc pack + search index config + reproducibility tests.
games.kpi: Time‑to‑discover, TTFD ≤1.5s, reproducibility ≥90%.
games.accept: Verified third‑party replays.

games.name: King of the Hill (Pipeline Ownership)
games.do: Own the publish→index→archive hill; challengers try to outperform your SLOs.
games.make: Hill SLOs + chaos drills + guardrails.
games.kpi: Uptime, P95 latency, error budgets.
games.accept: 72h defended under chaos with budgets intact.

games.name: Territory Control (Domain Map)
games.do: Each territory = a domain KPI (reliability, SoV, GDP). Hold by meeting threshold 2 cycles.
games.make: Territory plan + KPI evidence + patrol logs.
games.kpi: Threshold attainment & hold duration.
games.accept: Neutral audit certifies control.

games.name: Boss Raids (Co‑op PvE)
games.do: Multiple teams fight a scripted major incident to restore & improve.
games.make: Raid runbook, hotfix PRs, post‑mortem.
games.kpi: MTTR, mean time between regressions, permanent fix ratio.
games.accept: Fix merged + regression tests added.

games.name: Alliance Draft (Rotating Partners)
games.do: Top captains draft mixed rosters weekly; face new briefs each week.
games.make: Draft board + role matrix + weekly brief results.
games.kpi: Team cohesion score; speed to shared standards.
games.accept: 3 weeks rotation; cohesion trend up.

games.name: Supply Chain (Upstream/Downstream)
games.do: Upstream provides artifact/API; downstream consumes; judged jointly.
games.make: Contract tests, SLAs, deprecation plan.
games.kpi: Consumer break rate; version adoption speed.
games.accept: Contract tests green; adoption ≥80% in cycle.

games.name: Royal Rumble (Free‑for‑All)
games.do: 12–24 teams; timed eliminations when KPIs dip below floor.
games.make: Live scoreboard + elimination RCAs.
games.kpi: Composite score over time; survival + impact.
games.accept: No safety violations; all RCAs merged.

games.name: Battle Royale (Last Team Standing)
games.do: Shared backlog; pick tasks strategically; failing tasks storm your score.
games.make: Task picks + proof logs.
games.kpi: Value delivered / minute; failure avoidance.
games.accept: Verified value tally; ≤ agreed retries.

games.name: Circle Collapse (Scope Shrinks)
games.do: Every 30 min constraints tighten (budget, time, tools).
games.make: Constraint maps + adaptive plans.
games.kpi: Delivery under constraint; quality preserved.
games.accept: All rings cleared; quality gates pass.

games.name: Gauntlet Teams (Endurance Relay)
games.do: 6 stations (build, test, docs, media, search, DR); clear all in order.
games.make: Station artifacts + pass stamps.
games.kpi: Total gauntlet time; station rework rate.
games.accept: Zero station fails; rework ≤1.

games.name: Tri‑Alliance Siege
games.do: Three alliances fight for SoV + GDP + Reliability in parallel; diplomacy bonus for shared fixes.
games.make: Alliance treaties + shared PRs.
games.kpi: Weighted tri‑metric index.
games.accept: Shared fixes merged across alliances.

games.name: Drafted Rumble (Captains’ Choice)
games.do: Captains draft cross‑skill squads live; immediate brief starts.
games.make: Draft rationale + role grid + result pack.
games.kpi: Time‑to‑first‑value; handoff success; novelty score.
games.accept: All roles utilized; novelty evidenced.
